mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pay_channel_config (created_at, updated_at, channel_code, channel_name, enabled, disbursement_enabled, repayment_enabled, single_limit_cents, extra_config) VALUES (#{createdAt, typeHandler=com.winder.common.mybatis.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.winder.common.mybatis.InstantTypeHandler}, #{channelCode}, #{channelName}, #{enabled}, #{disbursementEnabled}, #{repaymentEnabled}, #{singleLimitCents}, #{extraConfig})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pay_channel_config WHERE channel_code = #{channelCode} AND enabled = TRUE
SELECT * FROM pay_channel_config WHERE enabled = TRUE
